seoTitle: Mariginiup vs Marne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mariginiup and Marne. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mariginiup and Marne.
heading: Mariginiup vs Marne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mariginiup, Western Australia and Marne, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mariginiup has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Marne (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mariginiup or Marne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mariginiup has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Marne scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mariginiup scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Marne scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mariginiup or Marne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mariginiup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
